word: H4113 - מַהֲמֹרָה - mahămôrâh - mah-ham-o-raw' - Deep pit

sections.paragraph:
Original: מהמרה

Transliteration: mahămôrâh

Phonetic: mah-ham-o-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. a flood, a pit of water, watery pit

Origin: from an unused root of uncertain meaning

TWOT entry: 509a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
